extraction.one_line_summary: MÜLBERGER Gregor attacked from a 4-rider breakaway at 1km to go in flat finale, held off Quick-Step's late numerical advantage for first WorldTour stage win
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step got Shachmann and Steebar into late breakaway but failed coordination allowing solo Mülberger attack to succeed with 1km left
Van Avermaet/Matthews took time gap from main chase group in finale despite being caught behind breakaway decision

rider_signals.MÜLBERGER Gregor: positive: attacked 1km out from breakaway despite having no team support against Quick-Step's 2v1 numerical advantage
rider_signals.SHACHMANN Max: negative: bridged to breakaway but couldn't prevent Mülberger's attack despite having Steebar as second Quick-Step rider
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: neutral: limited losses by taking time gap with Matthews despite missing decisive breakaway move
